## 📝 Submission Guidelines

Please ensure:
- [ ] Bug description is clear and concise
- [ ] Steps to reproduce are complete
- [ ] Error messages/logs are included
- [ ] Environment information is provided
- [ ] Impact assessment is accurate

**Note:** For security-related crawling issues (blocked IPs, etc.), please redact sensitive information.
